primary_event.headline: Notion turns its workspace into a hub for AI agents
primary_event.summary: Notion released a new developer platform enabling teams to connect AI agents, external data sources, and custom code directly into their workspace. This positions Notion as a central hub for agentic productivity software, expanding beyond document collaboration into autonomous workflow orchestration.
